title: Pokkiri Simon: Oru Kadutha Aaradhakan
overview: Simon, a charming young Malayalee boy, is a die-hard fan of the Tamil superstar Vijay. However, his parents, who dream of a successful career for him, soon get worried about Simon's craze for Vijay becomes his obsession, which in turn affects his life negatively. However, Simon's addiction adds dramatic and interesting experiences to his life.
